# Power Interview AI

> Privacy-first, desktop AI interview coach and meeting note taker for Windows and macOS - live transcription, AI reply and code suggestions, mock interview practice, and smart session exports for Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams.

Power Interview AI is a standalone desktop application, not a browser extension or cloud service. All sensitive data (transcripts, screenshots) stays on the user's device by default. New users get a full 1-hour free trial with the product's free model, no rate limits. Paid plans add a SOTA (state-of-the-art) model with no usage limits. Users can also bring their own LLM provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or others) using API keys they control. Payment is cryptocurrency-only - no credit card, PayPal, or bank details required. macOS builds are temporarily unavailable while the team works on bringing them back online; Windows is fully supported today.

## Product pages

- [Home](https://www.powerinterviewai.com/): overview, free trial offer, and product demo.
- [Features](https://www.powerinterviewai.com/features): live transcription, AI reply suggestions, stealth mode, code suggestions, meeting note export, mock interviews.
- [Pricing](https://www.powerinterviewai.com/pricing): free trial, credit-based paid plans, and cryptocurrency payment details.
- [Why Choose](https://www.powerinterviewai.com/why-choose): privacy and stealth-mode differentiation versus other interview-assistant and interview-practice tools.
- [Benefits](https://www.powerinterviewai.com/benefits): outcomes for job seekers using the product.
- [FAQ](https://www.powerinterviewai.com/faq): platform support, privacy model, billing, and usage questions.
- [Contact](https://www.powerinterviewai.com/contact): support and community channels (email, GitHub, Telegram, X, Discord).
